Reflections.label: Creation
Reflections.description: What counts as making in the age of AI? Exploring the ethics, value, and consequences of machine-assisted creation.

Reflections.label: Identity
Reflections.description: Can AI help define humanity, or does it reduce us to patterns? Examining what AI can and cannot capture about human experience.

Reflections.label: Authenticity
Reflections.description: Authenticity in an age of human-AI collaboration. How human choice and agency shape genuine creative expression.

Reflections.label: Role
Reflections.description: Is AI a collaborator, tool, or plagiarist? Untangling the complex roles machines play in storytelling and creative work.

Reflections.label: Ownership
Reflections.description: Who owns AI-made art? Examining authorship and remix culture in a system of distributed creative responsibility.

Reflections.label: Tradeoffs
Reflections.description: What do we gain and lose when machines read literature? Speed and efficiency versus nuanced human interpretation.

Reflections.label: Power
Reflections.description: How AI perpetuates exploitation: examining global inequalities in labor, resources, and environmental impact across north and south.

Reflections.label: Behind the Scenes
Reflections.description: Who is invisible in AI networks? How visualization shapes our understanding of power and responsibility.

Reflections.label: Generation
Reflections.description: When AI generates endlessly, creativity becomes direction. Exploring human agency through rulesets and guidance.

Reflections.label: Rulesets
Reflections.description: How AI changes play, rules, and narrative. Understanding machines as rule-based systems opens new creative possibilities.

Reflections.label: Visibility
Reflections.description: Who does the invisible work of AI, and who profits? Examining the labor exploitation hidden behind corporate gains.

Reflections.label: Ecology
Reflections.description: Is AI sustainable? Weighing ecological trade-offs and the true environmental cost of our technological acceleration.

Reflections.label: Outlook
Reflections.description: Between utopia and dystopia: imagining AI futures and what our expectations reveal about who we are today.

Reflections.label: Conclusions
Reflections.description: Pondering the AI vs. humanity debate.
